title: oldenlandia havilandii
intro: Oldenlandia havilandii, also known as Hati-hati or Philippine Yerba Buena, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Oldenlandia havilandii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusion, and tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
